requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Appliances (TCVN CISPR 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用电器（TCVN CISPR 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用電器（TCVN CISPR 14系列）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility of household refrigerating appliances in Vietnam is assessed against the Vietnamese adoption of the CISPR 14 series: TCVN 7492-1 / TCVN CISPR 14-1 (emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus, adopting CISPR 14-1) and TCVN 7492-2 / TCVN CISPR 14-2 (immunity requirements, adopting CISPR 14-2). A refrigerator with an electric motor-compressor is an apparatus within scope. EMC requirements are applied through the relevant national technical regulation framework and conformity assessment administered under STAMEQ (Ministry of Science and Technology); where the product is in scope of a QCVN that covers EMC, demonstrating compliance with the TCVN CISPR 14 emission and immunity limits forms part of the conformity file supporting the CR mark. Testing covers conducted and radiated disturbance (emission) and immunity to common electromagnetic phenomena.
summary.zh: 越南家用制冷器具的电磁兼容依据CISPR 14系列的越南采标评定：TCVN 7492-1／TCVN CISPR 14-1（家用电器、电动工具及类似器具骚扰发射要求，采用CISPR 14-1）及TCVN 7492-2／TCVN CISPR 14-2（抗扰度要求，采用CISPR 14-2）。带电动机—压缩机的电冰箱属适用器具范围。EMC要求通过相关国家技术法规框架及STAMEQ（科学技术部）主管的合格评定实施；当产品属涵盖EMC的QCVN范围时，证明符合TCVN CISPR 14发射及抗扰度限值构成支持CR标志的合格文件的一部分。检测涵盖传导及辐射骚扰（发射）以及对常见电磁现象的抗扰度。
summary.zht: 越南家用製冷器具的電磁相容依據CISPR 14系列的越南採標評定：TCVN 7492-1／TCVN CISPR 14-1（家用電器、電動工具及類似器具騷擾發射要求，採用CISPR 14-1）及TCVN 7492-2／TCVN CISPR 14-2（抗擾度要求，採用CISPR 14-2）。帶電動機—壓縮機的電冰箱屬適用器具範圍。EMC要求通過相關國家技術法規框架及STAMEQ（科學技術部）主管的合格評定實施；當產品屬涵蓋EMC的QCVN範圍時，證明符合TCVN CISPR 14發射及抗擾度限值構成支持CR標誌的合格文件的一部分。檢測涵蓋傳導及輻射騷擾（發射）以及對常見電磁現象的抗擾度。

standards_or_laws: TCVN 7492-1 / TCVN CISPR 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (adoption of CISPR 14-1)
TCVN 7492-2 / TCVN CISPR 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity (adoption of CISPR 14-2)
Law No. 68/2006/QH11 on Standards and Technical Regulations (conformity-assessment framework administered by STAMEQ/MOST)

summary.en: In China, EMC for household refrigerators is governed by GB 4343.1 (emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus, equivalent to CISPR 14-1) and GB 4343.2 (immunity, equivalent to CISPR 14-2). EMC testing to GB 4343.1/4343.2 is part of the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) assessment for household refrigerators. The GB 4343 series is technically aligned with the CISPR 14 series that Vietnam adopts as TCVN, but the Chinese CCC EMC test reports are issued under the Chinese scheme and are not automatically accepted as the Vietnamese conformity evidence.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱的EMC由GB 4343.1（家用电器、电动工具及类似器具骚扰发射要求，等同CISPR 14-1）及GB 4343.2（抗扰度，等同CISPR 14-2）管辖。按GB 4343.1/4343.2进行的EMC检测是家用电冰箱中国强制性认证（CCC）评定的一部分。GB 4343系列在技术上与越南采为TCVN的CISPR 14系列一致，但中国CCC的EMC检测报告依中国制度签发，不会自动被接受为越南合格证据。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱的EMC由GB 4343.1（家用電器、電動工具及類似器具騷擾發射要求，等同CISPR 14-1）及GB 4343.2（抗擾度，等同CISPR 14-2）管轄。按GB 4343.1/4343.2進行的EMC檢測是家用電冰箱中國強制性認證（CCC）評定的一部分。GB 4343系列在技術上與越南採為TCVN的CISPR 14系列一致，但中國CCC的EMC檢測報告依中國制度簽發，不會自動被接受為越南合格證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (equivalent to CISPR 14-1)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — EMC testing forms part of CCC for household refrigerators

gap.en: The GB 4343 series and the TCVN CISPR 14 series share the same CISPR 14 base, so the underlying limits and methods are largely equivalent. The gap is procedural rather than technical: (1) Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted in Vietnam — EMC evidence must be presented to the STAMEQ-designated body within the Vietnamese conformity file. (2) The certification body decides whether existing GB 4343.1/4343.2 reports (or IEC/CISPR reports under a recognised scheme such as IECEE CB) can be leveraged or whether re-testing at a recognised laboratory is needed. (3) Documentation, model coverage, and the rated-voltage test condition (220 V, 50 Hz) must match the Vietnamese registration. Exporters should confirm with the chosen Vietnamese conformity body whether their CISPR 14-based reports are accepted before assuming no re-testing.
gap.zh: GB 4343系列与TCVN CISPR 14系列同以CISPR 14为基础，故底层限值及方法基本等效。差距属程序性而非技术性：（1）中国CCC的EMC检测报告在越南不被自动接受——EMC证据须在越南合格文件中提交给STAMEQ指定机构。（2）由认证机构决定现有GB 4343.1/4343.2报告（或在IECEE CB等被承认制度下的IEC/CISPR报告）是否可被采用，抑或须在认可实验室重新检测。（3）文件、型号覆盖范围及额定电压试验条件（220V，50Hz）须与越南注册一致。出口商在假定无须重新检测前，应向所选越南合格机构确认其基于CISPR 14的报告是否被接受。
gap.zht: GB 4343系列與TCVN CISPR 14系列同以CISPR 14為基礎，故底層限值及方法基本等效。差距屬程序性而非技術性：（1）中國CCC的EMC檢測報告在越南不被自動接受——EMC證據須在越南合格文件中提交給STAMEQ指定機構。（2）由認證機構決定現有GB 4343.1/4343.2報告（或在IECEE CB等被承認制度下的IEC/CISPR報告）是否可被採用，抑或須在認可實驗室重新檢測。（3）文件、型號覆蓋範圍及額定電壓試驗條件（220V，50Hz）須與越南登記一致。出口商在假定無須重新檢測前，應向所選越南合格機構確認其基於CISPR 14的報告是否被接受。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where in scope — EMC conformity to the TCVN CISPR 14 series forms part of the conformity file/CR mark for household appliances that fall within the applicable QCVN; administered under STAMEQ/MOST
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC testing to GB 4343.1 / GB 4343.2 forms part of CCC certification for household refrigerators in China

source.publisher: STAMEQ — Directorate for Standards, Metrology and Quality (Ministry of Science and Technology, Vietnam)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC compliance to the TCVN CISPR 14 series is technically close to China's GB 4343 series (shared CISPR 14 base), but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted in Vietnam. Exporters should confirm with the STAMEQ-designated body whether existing CISPR 14-based reports can be leveraged or whether re-testing at a recognised laboratory is required for the CR conformity file.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合TCVN CISPR 14系列的EMC在技术上与中国GB 4343系列接近（共用CISPR 14基础），但中国CCC的EMC报告在越南不被自动接受。出口商应向STAMEQ指定机构确认现有基于CISPR 14的报告可否采用，抑或须在认可实验室重新检测以纳入CR合格文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合TCVN CISPR 14系列的EMC在技術上與中國GB 4343系列接近（共用CISPR 14基礎），但中國CCC的EMC報告在越南不被自動接受。出口商應向STAMEQ指定機構確認現有基於CISPR 14的報告可否採用，抑或須在認可實驗室重新檢測以納入CR合格文件。
